rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documents And Further Deposition And Declaration Of Sloan In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: The Motion to Reconsider (mistitled as ¿Motion to Compel Production of Documents and Further Deposition¿) is denied. The moving party has not presented new facts or circumstances within the meaning of C.C.P. section 1008, and, in any event, to the extent any of moving party¿s submission was properly considered new facts or circumstances, it would not lead the Court to change its ruling. Any Party wishing to argue the motion must advise opposing parties and notify the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, July 18, 2012.
